V0046_01_00_08_0.text:
The Big Five!
You'll pay for betraying my big brother!

V0046_01_00_12_0.text: When I say I'd do anything for Seto, this proves it!

V0046_01_00_15_0.text:
Hi. I'm Princess Adena.
...Really! I am her!

V0046_01_00_16_0.text:
H-Hey, Seto!
I promise I have a good explanation for this.

V0046_03_00_04_0.text: It's not supposed to happen like this...

V0046_05_00_00_0.text: Here's when I make my comeback!

V0046_06_01_02_0.text: You can't get away from me!

V0046_07_09_00_0.text: I flip over my face-down card!

V0046_08_00_00_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Gift of The Mystical Elf!

V0046_08_00_01_0.text: It's never too early to serve you your lunch!

V0046_08_00_01_1.text: I activate the Ritual Spell, Hamburger Recipe!

V0046_08_00_02_0.text:
Hahaha!
You fell for it, dummy!

V0046_08_00_02_1.text:
I activate my trap!
Trojan Blast!

V0046_08_00_03_0.text: Seto gave me this card to take ya down!

V0046_08_00_03_1.text: I activate the Spell Card, The Flute of Summoning Dragon!

V0046_08_00_04_1.text: I activate my Spell Card, Ancient Rules!

V0046_08_00_05_0.text: My big bro taught me this trick!

V0046_08_00_06_0.text:
I'm activating my Spell Card!
Draconnection!

V0046_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Polymerization!

V0046_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Beacon of White!

V0046_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap Card!
Dragon's Rage!

V0046_08_00_11_0.text: Here's the Trap Card, D. Tribe!

V0046_08_00_12_0.text:
My Continuous Trap Card!
The Dragon's Bead!

V0046_08_00_13_0.text: I activate The Dragon's Bead's effect!

V0046_08_00_14_0.text:
I'm playing my Spell Card!
Stamping Destruction!

V0046_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Pre-Preparation of Rites!

V0046_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Preparation of Rites!

V0046_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Fulfillment of the Contract!

V0046_08_00_18_0.text: The Quick-Play Spell, Poison of the Old Man!

V0046_08_00_19_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Burst Stream of Destruction!

V0046_08_00_20_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Neutron Blast!

V0046_08_00_21_0.text: I'm starting up the ultimate bingo machine!

V0046_08_00_22_0.text:
I'm activating my Spell Card!
A Wingbeat of Giant Dragon!

V0046_08_00_23_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dragon Revival Rhapsody!

V0046_08_00_24_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
The Melody of Awakening Dragon!

V0046_09_00_00_1.text: Kaibaman can call out Blue-Eyes White Dragon from my hand!

V0046_09_00_03_0.text: Blue-Eyes Jet Dragon activates its effect!

V0046_09_00_04_0.text: Kaibaman the Legend activates his effect!

V0046_09_00_05_0.text: I activate Dictator of D.'s effect!

V0046_09_00_06_0.text: I activate The King of D.'s effect!

V0046_09_00_07_0.text:
Mystical Elf - White Lightning!
Activate your effect!

V0046_09_00_10_0.text:
This kid's no slouch!
Kidmodo Dragon activates its effect!

V0046_09_00_11_0.text: Call the chef because I'm activating Angry Burger's effect!

V0046_09_00_12_0.text:
I activate Angry Burger's effect!
Ready for seconds?

V0046_10_00_02_0.text: This monster's gonna give you a heart attack!

V0046_11_00_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Attack Position!

V0046_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0046_13_00_00_0.text: This monster's got a bad attitude!

V0046_13_00_01_1.text: Or should I say, Mystical Elf!

V0046_13_00_02_0.text: This monster's axes are sharper than sharp!

V0046_13_00_03_0.text: This monster'll turn you into fertilizer!

V0046_13_00_04_0.text: Here's a monster you can snack on! Or better yet, snack on you!

V0046_13_00_05_0.text: Not anyone can wield my big bro's best card!

V0046_13_00_06_0.text: Here comes the coolest superhero of all time!

V0046_13_00_07_0.text:
Try this on for size!
Tatsunootoshigo!

V0046_13_00_08_0.text:
I play this!
The Trojan Horse!

V0046_13_00_09_0.text: If you're looking to cross a desert, this bird's what you're lookin' for!

V0046_13_00_10_0.text: Seto always has this monster ready to support his dragons!

V0046_13_00_12_0.text: I bet you've never seen this dragon before!

V0046_13_00_13_0.text: This monster will make you feel lackluster!

V0046_13_00_14_0.text: This monster has more than a few attack points!

V0046_13_00_15_0.text: Don't get blinded by its scales!

V0046_13_00_16_0.text: Ha Ha! I know you definitely won't like this!

V0046_13_00_17_0.text:
I'm flying towards victory!
Blue-Eyes Jet Dragon!

V0046_13_00_19_0.text: Here comes the legend who's a hero to you and me!

V0046_13_00_22_0.text:
Princess Adena!
I can sure use your help!

V0046_13_00_27_0.text: This meal's gonna make a meal out of you!

V0046_15_00_00_0.text: You won't get away from me!

V0046_19_00_03_0.text: My Man-Eating Plant is gonna eat you alive!

V0046_19_00_04_0.text: Isn't it weird when food eats YOU instead of the other way around?

V0046_19_00_06_0.text: The hero always wins in the end!

V0046_21_00_00_0.text:
This Duel's practically over!
I end my turn!

V0046_21_00_01_0.text:
Ha ha ha!
I'm ending my turn!

V0046_21_00_02_0.text:
Why's this happening...
I end my turn!

V0046_21_00_03_0.text:
Just wave the white flag.
You're not gonna beat me.

V0046_21_00_05_0.text: What am I supposed to do...

V0046_26_00_02_0.text: Why you hafta be so mean!

V0046_28_00_06_0.text: Did I make your proud, Seto?

V0046_28_00_09_0.text:
I'm glad I'm not you!
Because you're just a bunch of losers!

V0046_28_00_11_0.text: I hate to say it, but I really do look like Princess Adena.

V0046_28_00_12_0.text:
Hahaha! Take that!
...I mean - thank you for a lovely Duel!

V0046_28_00_13_0.text: You were so focused on my getup that you forgot your moves!

V0046_28_00_14_0.text:
Hahaha! You were nothin'!
...Oops! You played wonderfully!

V0046_29_00_06_0.text: I knew I could never beat ya, big bro!

V0046_29_00_09_0.text: What was the point of dressing up like this?

V0046_29_00_10_0.text: I must now offer myself to the mythic dragon...

V0046_29_00_10_1.text:
Wait a sec!
No I don't!

V0046_29_00_11_0.text: I would've won if it wasn't for this ridiculous costume!

V0046_29_00_12_0.text:
Sorry Seto...
I was no help at all...

V0046_30_00_02_0.text: What's the point of a brain if you don't use it to think?

V0046_33_00_02_0.text: I'm gonna beat you, and that's that!

V0046_34_00_00_0.text: So this is what you were planning all along...

V0046_34_00_06_0.text:
Ahhhh!
Seto, I could really use your help!

V0046_34_00_08_0.text: I can't keep relying on Seto. I gotta stand on my own.

V0046_34_00_11_0.text: What - you've never seen a princess before?

V0046_34_00_13_0.text: The fate of our kingdom rests on your shoulders! ...Good?

V0046_34_00_14_0.text: Crush that- I mean, please defeat the Five-Headed Dragon.

V0046_34_00_15_0.text:
You're awesom- Ahem.
I meant to say that you're true heroes.

V0046_35_00_00_0.text:
I am Princess Adena of Sin Lau.
...Was that good?

V0046_35_00_01_0.text: Argh... I just have to remember I'm doing this for Seto!

V0046_36_00_00_0.text:
Heh heh!
You can clean the rest of this Duel!

V0046_36_00_01_0.text: Don't let your guard down! Even for a moment!

V0046_36_00_02_0.text: You gotta beat 'em for me! Please!

V0046_36_00_05_0.text:
Yugi!
If you can't beat 'em, who can?

V0046_36_00_06_0.text:
Hee hee!
Seto's turn will be your last!

V0046_36_00_07_0.text: I know I can always count on you, big bro!

V0046_36_00_11_0.text: What are you gonna do, Noah?

V0046_37_00_00_0.text: The three strongest dragons combine into one!
